ForEachEmailX.name: ForEachEmailX
ForEachEmailX.xaml_template:
<umab:ForEachEmailX MailFilter="{x:Null}" Mails="{x:Null}" IncludeSubfolders="False" NumberOfEmailsLimit="100" UnreadOnly="False" WithAttachmentsOnly="False">

  <umab:ForEachEmailX.Body>

    <ActivityAction x:TypeArguments="snm:MailMessage, x:Int32">

      <ActivityAction.Argument1>

        <DelegateInArgument x:TypeArguments="snm:MailMessage" Name="CurrentMail" />

      </ActivityAction.Argument1>

      <ActivityAction.Argument2>

        <DelegateInArgument x:TypeArguments="x:Int32" Name="CurrentIndex" />

      </ActivityAction.Argument2>

      <Sequence DisplayName="Do" />

    </ActivityAction>

  </umab:ForEachEmailX.Body>

</umab:ForEachEmailX>

GetOutlookMailMessages.name: GetOutlookMailMessages
GetOutlookMailMessages.xaml_template:
<ui:GetOutlookMailMessages Account="{x:Null}" Filter="{x:Null}" FilterByMessageIds="{x:Null}" Messages="{x:Null}" TimeoutMS="{x:Null}" ConnectionMode="Undefined" GetAttachements="False" MailFolder="Inbox" MarkAsRead="False" OnlyUnreadMessages="True" OrderByDate="NewestFirst" Top="30" UseISConnection="False">

  <ui:GetOutlookMailMessages.ConnectionDetailsBackupSlot>

    <usau:BackupSlot x:TypeArguments="umae:ConnectionDetails" StoredValue="{x:Null}">

      <usau:BackupSlot.BackupValues>

        <scg:Dictionary x:TypeArguments="umae:ConnectionDetails, scg:List(x:Object)" />

      </usau:BackupSlot.BackupValues>

    </usau:BackupSlot>

  </ui:GetOutlookMailMessages.ConnectionDetailsBackupSlot>

</ui:GetOutlookMailMessages>

SaveMailAttachments.name: SaveMailAttachments
SaveMailAttachments.xaml_template: <ui:SaveMailAttachments Attachments="{x:Null}" FolderPath="{x:Null}" Message="{x:Null}" ResourceAttachments="{x:Null}" ExcludeInlineAttachments="False" OverwriteExisting="False" />

SendOutlookMail.name: SendOutlookMail
SendOutlookMail.xaml_template:
<ui:SendOutlookMail Account="{x:Null}" Bcc="{x:Null}" Body="{x:Null}" Cc="{x:Null}" ContinueOnError="{x:Null}" MailMessage="{x:Null}" ReplyTo="{x:Null}" Subject="{x:Null}" TimeoutMS="{x:Null}" To="{x:Null}" UseRichTextEditor="{x:Null}" ConnectionMode="Undefined" Importance="Normal" IsBodyHtml="False" IsDraft="False" Sensitivity="Normal" UseISConnection="False">

  <ui:SendOutlookMail.ConnectionDetailsBackupSlot>

    <usau:BackupSlot x:TypeArguments="umae:ConnectionDetails" StoredValue="{x:Null}">

      <usau:BackupSlot.BackupValues>

        <scg:Dictionary x:TypeArguments="umae:ConnectionDetails, scg:List(x:Object)" />

      </usau:BackupSlot.BackupValues>

    </usau:BackupSlot>

  </ui:SendOutlookMail.ConnectionDetailsBackupSlot>

  <ui:SendOutlookMail.Files>

    <scg:List x:TypeArguments="InArgument(x:String)" Capacity="0" />

  </ui:SendOutlookMail.Files>

</ui:SendOutlookMail>
